description: Large legal document. Fragment (left side only). Written in a large square hand. Dating: Might be 11th century. Concerns a partnership in a shop and a warehouse between Shelomo b. Avraham and Efrayim b. Ṣibyān (unless Efrayim and [...] b. Ṣibyān are different people). Mentions dividing things (profits? liabilities? both?) into two shares, one of 19/24 and one of 5/24. Cf. T-S 12.669 (PGPID 20048).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
